highlights: 无50/50抽卡系统，限定池不歪
都市大亨(City Tycoon)、房屋、载具驾驶系统
P5联动 — 车载音响收录《女神异闻录5》经典歌曲
全球预约3500万+，6平台同步上线
highlightsEn: City Tycoon, Housing, and Vehicle Driving systems
Persona 5 collaboration — P5 music in car stereo

items.name: 娜娜莉
items.description: S级角色，1.0版本限定卡池 featured 角色。Eibon古董店招牌异能者，猫族格斗家。
items.descriptionEn: S-rank character, featured banner character for version 1.0. The star Anomaly of Eibon Antique Shop, a cat-tribe close-combat fighter.

items.name: 奥蕾莉亚
items.description: A级角色，公测新加入角色。
items.descriptionEn: A-rank character, newly confirmed for launch.

items.name: 城市经营
items.description: 全新的城市经营模拟玩法，玩家可以经营自己的城市，获取丰厚奖励。通过城市经营可获得S级角色小芷。
items.descriptionEn: A brand-new city management simulation mode. Players can manage their own city and earn generous rewards. S-rank character Xiaozhi can be obtained through this mode.

items.name: 房屋系统
items.description: 全新的房屋装饰与建造系统，玩家可以自定义和装饰自己的居所。
items.descriptionEn: A new housing decoration and building system. Players can customize and decorate their own residence.

items.name: 载具驾驶
items.description: 开放世界中可驾驶各种载具自由探索，体验沉浸式城市穿梭。
items.descriptionEn: Drive various vehicles to freely explore the open world and experience immersive city traversal.

items.name: 粉色爪爪合作模式
items.description: 全新的多人合作玩法，与好友一起组队挑战。
items.descriptionEn: A new multiplayer co-op mode. Team up with friends for cooperative challenges.

items.name: 监狱系统
items.description: 全新的游戏机制，与游戏剧情和玩法深度结合。
items.descriptionEn: A new game mechanic deeply integrated with the story and gameplay.

items.name: 随身听功能
items.description: 公测新增随身听功能，可在探索时播放音乐，车载音响收录P5经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: New Walkman feature for exploring with music. Car stereo includes Persona 5 classic tracks.

items.name: P5联动
items.description: 公测前瞻公布与《女神异闻录：夜幕魅影》联动，车载音响收录P5经典音乐。
items.descriptionEn: Collaboration with Persona 5: Phantom X announced. P5 classic music in car stereo.

items.name: 无50/50机制
items.description: 异环抽卡不设50/50机制，抽取限定角色时必定获得当期 featured 角色，无需担心歪角色。
items.descriptionEn: Neverness to Everness has no 50/50 system. When pulling for a limited character, you are guaranteed to get the featured character — no risk of losing to off-banner characters.

items.name: 新手卡池
items.description: 新手专属卡池，共20抽，可自选获得一位S级角色。
items.descriptionEn: Exclusive beginner banner with 20 pulls total. Players can select and obtain one S-rank character of their choice.

items.name: 常驻卡池自选
items.description: 常驻卡池累计抽取50次后，可自选获得一位S级角色。
items.descriptionEn: After accumulating 50 pulls on the standard banner, players can select and obtain one S-rank character of their choice.

items.name: 470+抽免费福利
items.description: 公测上线后玩家可通过各种活动、任务和邮件获取超过470次免费抽卡机会，开服即送120+抽。
items.descriptionEn: At launch, players can obtain over 470 free pulls through events, missions, and mail rewards. 120+ pulls available immediately.

items.name: 预注册奖励
items.description: 达成预注册里程碑后，所有玩家可获得丰厚预注册奖励。
items.descriptionEn: All players will receive generous pre-registration milestone rewards.

items.name: 直播兑换码
items.description: 公测前瞻直播中公布的兑换码，可在游戏内兑换奖励。
items.descriptionEn: Redeem codes revealed during the pre-launch livestream. Can be redeemed in-game for rewards.

items.name: 预下载
items.description: 预下载将于4月21日开放，玩家可提前下载游戏客户端。
items.descriptionEn: Pre-download begins April 21. Players can download the game client in advance.

items.name: PC 客户端
items.description: 支持 Windows PC 平台，公测同步上线。
items.descriptionEn: Available on Windows PC at launch.

items.name: 移动端
items.description: 支持 iOS 和 Android 平台，公测同步上线。
items.descriptionEn: Available on iOS and Android at launch.

items.name: PlayStation 5
items.description: PS5 版本与公测同步上线，支持手柄操作。
items.descriptionEn: PS5 version launches alongside all other platforms with controller support.

items.name: Mac 客户端
items.description: 支持 macOS 平台，公测同步上线。
items.descriptionEn: Available on macOS at launch.

items.name: 鸿蒙 HarmonyOS
items.description: 支持华为鸿蒙系统，公测同步上线。
items.descriptionEn: Available on Huawei HarmonyOS at launch.

highlights: 修复部分玩家无法登录的问题
修复部分任务无法完成的BUG
highlightsEn: Fixed login issues for some players

items.name: 登录问题修复
items.description: 修复部分玩家在特定网络环境下无法正常登录游戏的问题。
items.descriptionEn: Fixed an issue where some players could not log in under certain network conditions.

items.name: 移动端帧率优化
items.description: 优化中端手机的帧率表现，减少战斗场景掉帧。
items.descriptionEn: Optimized frame rate on mid-range phones, reducing drops during combat.

items.name: 技能动画修复
items.description: 修复部分角色技能动画卡顿和异常中断的问题。
items.descriptionEn: Fixed skill animation stuttering and abnormal interruptions for some characters.

items.name: 任务进度修复
items.description: 修复部分支线任务在特定条件下无法完成的问题。
items.descriptionEn: Fixed some side quests that could not be completed under specific conditions.
